name: facevault-kyc
author: FaceVault
bio: Self-hosted identity verification with AI face matching, document OCR, and anti-spoofing.
description: Replace cloud KYC providers with FaceVault — a privacy-first, self-hosted identity verification platform. Features include AI-powered face matching (ArcFace), document OCR/MRZ extraction, 15-signal document fraud detection, liveness detection, anti-spoofing, and proof of address verification. No per-verification cloud fees. All biometric data stays on your infrastructure.

api_key.description: Your FaceVault API key (starts with sk_live_ or sk_test_)

api_url.description: FaceVault API base URL (e.g. https://facevault.id or your self-hosted URL)

webhook_secret.description: Webhook signing secret from your FaceVault dashboard

verified_level.description: HollaEx verification level to assign on successful KYC (default: 2)

require_poa.description: Require proof of address (utility bill, bank statement) in addition to ID
